narrative:
Precinct Avon City 1-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 551 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
